props.ChoiceText: One voyage ran cleanly enough that the sea briefly seemed like a profession instead of a gamble.
props.ChoiceBio: A profitable crossing taught you how seductive routine success can be at sea.

0.TransitionText: Because a profitable crossing taught you how seductive routine success can be at sea, tide, weather, and hazard remained the terms of your life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Sailor, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a profitable crossing taught you how seductive routine success can be at sea, cargo, ports, and bargaining mattered as much as seamanship.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a profitable crossing taught you how seductive routine success can be at sea, coasts and safe routes ceased to satisfy you.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Explorer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
